â First-Off Sign-Off

A second operator must sign off the first-off by entering their PIN below. This confirms the part is within tolerance before production runs.

Select machine

First-Off Inspection Sign-Off

A different operator must sign off the first-off inspection. If you performed the operation, you cannot sign off your own first-off.

đ Create Material RFQ

Review the calculated material requirement below. You may want to increase the quantity to account for future orders, stock buffer, or offcuts.

đ Raise RFQ

Record supplier quote

This just records the price the supplier quoted â it doesn't place an order. Use "Accept" once your own quote to the customer has been won.

Add to draft RFQ

If a draft RFQ already exists for this supplier it'll be added as another line item. Otherwise a new draft is started. Nothing is sent to the supplier until you click "Send RFQ" on the Drafts tab.

Save estimate

Create material RFQ?

Some line items have no material price yet. Create a draft RFQ now to send to your supplier â when the quote comes back you can load this estimate and the prices will auto-fill.

Add new customer
